file: 1538_Shui 等 - 2020 - Hydro-liquefaction of asphaltene from a lignite for potential jet fuel.txt

experiments.description: 在高压釜反应器中，使用不同催化剂（Cu-Ni/γ-Al₂O₃, Ni/ZSM-5, Ni-Mo-S/γ-Al₂O₃）和条件（温度、时间），以四氢萘为溶剂，对褐煤沥青质（XLAS）进行催化加氢液化，以生产潜在的喷气燃料并研究环烷烃含量。
experiments.text_snippet: Hydro-liquefactions of XLAS were carried out in a tubing reactor with 30ml[16].Approximate 1.0g dried XLAS mixed with 0.1g catalystand5mloftetralinwerechargedtogetherintothereactor.AfterflushingbyH2 3timesthereactorwaspressuredtotheinitialpressureof5.0MPawithhydrogen.Thenthereactorwasimmergedintoaeutecticsaltbath,whichhadbeenheatedtothedesiredtemperatureandshakenverticallyat120times/min.

Feedstock.value: XLAS (asphaltene from thermal dissolution of Xilingguole lignite)
Feedstock.original: XLAS (asphaltene from thermal dissolution of Xilingguole lignite)

Catalyst loading.original: 10 wt% (0.1 g catalyst per 1.0 g XLAS)

Product yield.original: {'Oil yield (Ni-Mo-S/γ-Al₂O₃, 360°C, 90 min)': '68.8 wt%', 'Oil yield (Cu-Ni/γ-Al₂O₃, 360°C, 90 min)': 'Lower than without catalyst', 'Oil yield (Ni/ZSM-5, 360°C, 90 min)': 'Not reported', 'Gas yield (Cu-Ni/γ-Al₂O₃, 360°C, 90 min)': '19.6 wt%'}

Product Selectivity.original: {'Cyclanes selectivity (Ni-Mo-S/γ-Al₂O₃, 360°C, 90 min)': '20.5% in oil', 'Cyclanes selectivity (280°C, 90 min)': '29.3% in oil', 'Cyclanes selectivity (360°C, 60 min)': '23.6% in oil', 'Arenes content': '>70% in oil', 'Oxygen-containing compounds (Ni-Mo-S/γ-Al₂O₃)': '9.3% in oil'}
